payload.label: oven
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped stainless-steel oven front seen close-up (approx. 1.2 m away) with a horizontal handle draped by a white striped towel and a darker cloth, lower oven door and drawer visible, reflective metallic finish and slight smudging on the surface; crop focuses on the mid-lower front of the appliance.
